--- Sea Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Sea Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
